attacking_style: N/A - Morkov is a pure leadout specialist who does not attack for personal results. His role concludes 150-200m before the finish line delivering his sprinter.
team_tactics: Executes textbook leadout trains with precise positioning through technical sections and chaos. Maintains composure and positioning even in crosswind-affected stages to deliver sprinter optimally.
terrain_preference: Thrives in technical, chaotic finishes and crosswind conditions where positioning discipline separates elite leadout men. Flat sprint stages are his primary domain.
vulnerability: Mountain stages render his skill set irrelevant. Pure power-based sprint trains may overpower his more technical positioning-focused approach on wide, straight finishes.
key_patterns: Praised explicitly for sublime, textbook leadout execution across multiple seasons (2 observations)
Maintains elite positioning effectiveness through technical and crosswind-disrupted finishes (2 observations)
Consistently delivers sprinter (Cavendish) in optimal position 150-200m from line (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: praised for effectiveness across 2021 Tour and 2022 UAE Tour, demonstrating sustained elite leadout form
